description: Cancer type to medical specialist routing table

specialists.title: Breast Oncologist / Breast Surgeon
specialists.urgencyNote: Triple-negative breast cancer requires immediate referral

specialists.title: Pulmonary / Thoracic Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Small cell lung cancer is fast-growing — urgent referral

specialists.title: Gastrointestinal Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Pancreatic cancer has the worst 5-year survival — immediate referral

specialists.title: Urologic Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Testicular cancer has high cure rates even at advanced stages — fast referral still critical

specialists.title: Hematologist / Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Acute leukemias require same-day emergency evaluation

specialists.title: Hepatobiliary Oncologist / Transplant Surgeon
specialists.urgencyNote: HCC staging determines transplant eligibility — early referral critical

specialists.title: Endocrine Surgeon / Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Most thyroid cancers are slow-growing but anaplastic thyroid is emergency

specialists.title: Neuro-Oncologist / Neurosurgeon
specialists.urgencyNote: Brain tumors cause rapid neurological decline — urgent imaging and referral

specialists.title: Gynecologic Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Ovarian cancer is typically detected late — any signal warrants immediate workup

specialists.title: Orthopedic Oncologist / Musculoskeletal Surgeon
specialists.urgencyNote: Sarcomas are rare — referral to specialized sarcoma center preferred

specialists.title: Head & Neck Surgeon / Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: HPV-positive head and neck cancers have better prognosis but still need staged treatment

specialists.title: Thoracic Oncologist / Mesothelioma Specialist
specialists.urgencyNote: Mesothelioma is asbestos-linked and aggressive — specialized center mandatory

specialists.title: Pediatric Oncologist
specialists.urgencyNote: Neuroblastoma primarily affects children under 5 — pediatric center required

emergencyTriggers.description: Conditions that override normal routing and trigger ER recommendation
triggers: Rapid splotch progression between scans (>50% size increase in 24hr)
